name: Batch Backup of Active Exam Configurations
description: Log into the SEB Server at http://localhost:8080 (username: super-admin, password: admin). Download the client configuration files (.seb) for all exam configurations with an 'Active' or 'Ready' status to '~/Documents/ExamBackups/'. Rename the downloaded files to replace any spaces in the exam name with underscores (e.g., 'Math_Final.seb'). Do not download configurations for exams with Archived, Draft, or Hidden statuses.
